rationale: US-Iran deal remains the dominant story for Americans — conflicting signals on Sunday signing create uncertainty about a major foreign policy outcome with domestic implications.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Conflicting US-Iran signals keep Americans uncertain about a major deal that could affect oil prices, Middle East stability, and Trump's political standing.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike
top_events.summary: US airstrike eliminates TdA leader — continuation of established pattern of targeted strikes; limited new impact on daily American life.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Federal security-driven AI restrictions continue — ongoing policy constraint on AI sector with limited immediate impact on most Americans.
